name: Watercress Rice Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup wild rice (or a brown and wild rice mixture)
Bunch of watercress (spinach as an alternative)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice and wild rice according to package instructions, adding extra water to keep the rice slightly soupy.
2. Add the garbanzo beans, kidney beans, and black beans to the cooked rice mixture.
3. Stir in minced garlic, salt, pepper, rosemary, and sage.
4. Serve hot over a bed of watercress, garnished with chopped cilantro.
